title: Sample Itinerary
excerpt: See an example of a typical day at Camp Barney Medintz! 7:15 AM Wake Up 8:00 AM Breakfast 8:45 AM Health Call, Med Line, and Cabin Clean-up 9:15 AM Activity 1 – Ropes Activity 10:30 AM Activity 2 – Kickball 11:45 AM Lunch 12:45 PM Activity 3 – Tie-Dye 2:00 PM Rest Hour (mail and […]
contentHtml:
See an example of a typical day at Camp Barney Medintz!

7:15 AM Wake Up
8:00 AM Breakfast
8:45 AM Health Call, Med Line, and Cabin Clean-up
9:15 AM Activity 1 – Ropes Activity
10:30 AM Activity 2 – Kickball
11:45 AM Lunch
12:45 PM Activity 3 – Tie-Dye
2:00 PM Rest Hour (mail and canteen)
3:00 PM Activity 4 – The Blob!
4:15 PM Activity 5 – Theater Games
5:45 PM Dinner
6:45 PM Activity 6 – Archery
8:00 PM Activity 7 – Pool Party
8:45 PM Milkline (cookies and milk!)
9:15 PM Lights out (younger campers)
Activity 8 / Evening Programs  (older campers)
10:00 PM – 11:00 PM In Cabins /Lights Out (older campers)

The schedule will vary somewhat during Shabbat, for campouts, and campwide program days.
